issues.detail: The skill examples focus on happy path usage and do not handle error scenarios or edge cases.
The code assumes a Node.js environment (uses fs module) despite claiming browser compatibility.

scenarios.name: Measure text width and bounding box for layout
scenarios.rationale: Baseline derived height from ascender/descender and skipped the bounding box object; treatment used getPath + getBoundingBox plus getAdvanceWidth and returned the full shape.

scenarios.name: Subset a font to embed only the glyphs used by a banner string
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reached for pyftsubset rather than opentype.js, missing .notdef inclusion, dedup via seen indices, the new opentype.Font constructor, and download()+Buffer write; treatment matched every step.
